name: Wholeness
descs:
If the ally wins a Clash using a Skill that inflicts [Laceration] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Bleed', inflict 2~3 [NailPersonality].

'N Corp. Fanatic' Identities deal +25% damage against targets with [Laceration] and gain 1 Fanatic at Turn Start.
If the said ally's SP is maxed, also gain 3 [AttackDmgUp].

'N Corp. Fanatic' Identities gain Final Power +1, Plus Coin Power +1, Minus Coin Power -1, and their Attack Skills inflict +1 more [NailPersonality].
